title: Gateway: unified run/job state machine + mock provider adapter
description: ProviderAdapter contract (ADR-0006 ref). Mock adapter returns shaped JSON async. Idempotent POST /v1/runs, GET /v1/runs/:id, reserve-and-settle billing per ADR-0005.

title: packages/sdk: typed client (discover/inspect/run/runs/balance)
description: Shared by cli + web. Typed responses matching gateway. Fetch-based.

title: services/gateway: Hono skeleton + health + auth(api key)
description: Bun+Hono. /health, API-key middleware (argon2 hash), route stubs for /v1/tools/search /v1/runs /v1/balance. Shared types from sdk.

title: packages/cli: oclif skeleton with discover/inspect/run/runs/balance/keys
description: Per skill doc command surface. Config dir ~/.aegntic. JSON output (-j). talks to sdk.

title: SECURITY GATE: review before any billing/keys endpoint ships
description: security-reviewer + silent-failure-hunter pass on auth, ledger, key hashing, idempotency. Block P2 if CRITICAL.

title: P1 vertical slice: discover→inspect→run→poll end-to-end
description: Hero deliverable. Gateway + CLI + SDK wired so a mock provider returns structured JSON through the full chain, billed against balance stub. Demo = Checkpoint 1 'First Run'.

title: Supabase schema: workspaces, api_keys, balance_ledger, tools, jobs
description: Per ADR-0005 ledger invariants. SQL migration + RLS. pgvector on tools for NL discovery.

title: Monorepo tooling: pnpm workspaces + turbo
description: Root package.json, pnpm-workspace.yaml, turbo.json. packages/{cli,sdk}, services/gateway, apps/web. tsconfig base, eslint, prettier, vitest.
